text.tspan: CORRELATION ID: a single ID per user request, propagated everywhere,
logged with every record so you can find ALL the activity for ONE request
generates correlation_id = UUID (or uses incoming one)
put it in MDC / async context / logger context
EVERY log line includes it automatically:
propagate header to ALL outgoing calls
u2192 find that request's correlation_id (from app log)
u2192 search logs: filter [req-7f3a-bc12] u2192 see EVERY log line for that request
u2192 click trace ID u2192 see the span waterfall, find Stripe timeout
u2192 click metric exemplar u2192 see correlated latency spike
ALL THREE PILLARS (logs / traces / metrics) STITCHED TOGETHER
